name: Time Update
desc: Synchronizes the world time (day/night cycle) and the world age.

fields.name: worldTime
fields.desc: Current day/night time (0-24000). Mod 24000 for time of day.

encoding: Incremented each tick since world start
notes: Time of day values: 0=dawn, 6000=noon, 12000=sunset, 18000=midnight. When players sleep, time accelerates.

implementation.overview: Syncs world time. Carries totalWorldTime (long) and worldTime (long, 0-24000). Modules: TimeChanger, Ambience (modify/cancel time).

modules.name: TimeChanger
modules.purpose: Cancel time updates or replace with custom time.
